sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50332" key="i(larei/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱλᾰρ-εία</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n50332.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rejoicing</tr_>; in pl.,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἱλάρια, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen></foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2049.tlg001:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sallust.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
